hero.title: About PlaceFire
hero.description: We design and build luxury fireplaces that bring warmth and elegance to modern spaces.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: At PlaceFire, we specialize in designing and building custom fireplaces that combine traditional craftsmanship with modern architecture.
story.paragraph2: Our goal is to create elegant fireplace solutions that transform living spaces into warm and luxurious environments.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide our work and help us create exceptional designs.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We use premium materials and professional execution to deliver high quality fireplaces.

custom.title: Custom Design
custom.description: Every fireplace is designed according to customer needs and interior style.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Creative solutions based on expertise in modern and traditional fireplace designs.
